节点.功能描述:
Prints assertion information.
1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2. Incorrect parameters types.
3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { Object } [value] - Result value. If value is false or left blank, the output starting with "Assertion failed" is printed. If value is true, no information is printed.
@param { Object[] } arguments - Other information to be printed when value is false. If this parameter is left blank, other information is not printed.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - The parameter check failed. Possible causes:

parameters.说明: Object } [value] - Result value. If value is false or left blank, the output starting with "Assertion failed" is printed. If value is true, no information is printed.
Other information to be printed when value is false. If this parameter is left blank, other information is not printed.

error_codes.description: The parameter check failed. Possible causes:

节点.功能描述: Displays an interactive tree of the descendant elements of the specified XML element. This API is implemented by calling console.log() internally. It does not produce any XML elements. The usage method is the same as that of console.log().

parameters.说明: Information to be printed.

parameters.说明: Logs to be printed. If this parameter is left blank,

节点.功能描述: Prints information about the current hybrid stack of the calling thread in the main thread or worker thread.

Sets a repeating timer for the system to repeatedly call a function at a fixed interval. The timer can only be manually deleted by calling the clearInterval API. For devices of "tv", "phone, tablet", and "wearable" types, this parameter can be a function or string. For devices of "lite wearable" and "smartVision" types, this parameter must be a function.
注释信息: @param { Function | string } handler - Function to be called repeatedly. If the type is string, error information is printed and no other processing is performed.
@param { number } delay - Number of milliseconds delayed before the execution.
@param { any[] } arguments - Additional parameters to pass to the handler after the timer goes off.
@returns { number } ID of the timer. The timer ID is shared by processes and is an integer starting from 0 in ascending order.

parameters.说明: Function to be called repeatedly. If the type is string, error information is printed and no other processing is performed.
Number of milliseconds delayed before the execution.
Additional parameters to pass to the handler after the timer goes off.

节点.return_description: ID of the timer. The timer ID is shared by processes and is an integer starting from 0 in ascending order.

节点.功能描述: Sets a timer for the system to call a function after the timer goes off. The timer is automatically deleted after the callback is executed, and can be manually deleted by calling the clearTimeout API. For devices of "tv", "phone, tablet", and "wearable" types, this parameter can be a function or string. For devices of "lite wearable" and "smartVision" types, this parameter must be a function. If this parameter is not specified, the default value 0 is used, indicating that the function is executed immediately (in the next event loop). NOTE 1. In either case, the actual delay may be longer than expected. 2. If a value less than 1 is passed, the default value 0 is used.
注释信息: @param { Function | string } handler - Function to be called after the timer goes off. If the type is string, error information is printed and no other processing is performed.
@param { number } [delay] - Number of milliseconds delayed before the execution. It is recommended that an integer be passed in. A decimal will be rounded down.
@param { any[] } [arguments] - Additional parameters to pass to the handler after the timer goes off.
@returns { number } ID of the timer. The timer ID is shared by processes and is an integer starting from 0 in ascending order.

parameters.说明: Function to be called after the timer goes off. If the type is string, error information is printed and no other processing is performed.
any[] } [arguments] - Additional parameters to pass to the handler after the timer goes off.

节点.return_description: ID of the timer. The timer ID is shared by processes and is an integer starting from 0 in ascending order.

节点.功能描述: Cancels the repeating timer set via setInterval(). The timer object is stored in the thread that creates the timer and must be deleted in that thread.
注释信息: @param { number } [intervalID] - ID of the repeating timer to cancel, which is returned by setInterval(). If this parameter is omitted, no timer is canceled.

parameters.说明: number } [intervalID] - ID of the repeating timer to cancel, which is returned by setInterval(). If this parameter is omitted, no timer is canceled.

节点.功能描述: Cancels a timer set via setTimeout(). The timer object is stored in the thread that creates the timer and must be deleted in that thread.
注释信息: @param { number } [timeoutID] - ID of the timer to cancel, which is returned by setTimeout() If this parameter is omitted, no timer is canceled.

parameters.说明: number } [timeoutID] - ID of the timer to cancel, which is returned by setTimeout() If this parameter is omitted, no timer is canceled.

节点.功能描述: Get components tree.
Sends an event to the component with the specified ID.
注释信息: @param { string } id - ID of the component for which the event is to be sent.
@param { number } action - Type of the event to be sent. The options are as follows: Click event: 10 LongClick: 11.
@param { string } params - Event parameters. If there is no parameter, pass an empty string "".

parameters.说明: ID of the component for which the event is to be sent.
Type of the event to be sent. The options are as follows: Click event: 10 LongClick: 11.
Event parameters. If there is no parameter, pass an empty string "".
